posts.text:
BREAKING: President Trump calls for a physical audit of Fort Knox's gold reserves.

The US reports holding 147.3 million troy ounces of gold at Fort Knox, worth $500+ billion.

Yet, Fort Knox has not undergone an independent physical audit in over 70 years.
posts.author: KobeissiLetter

posts.text:
Consider the fractal nature of the human lungs.   Then consider how we will soon innovate new products by nano engineering, 3d printing, while using novel nano-materials.  

We are on the cusp of making monumental gains in efficiency and the core technology is turbostratic fractal graphene.  It’s the structural scaffolding of our future nano tech world
posts.author: BambroughKevin
